title: MC Plus
description: A collection of various mods that make the game more immersive and beautiful
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65d878ae58d2bdd4e30d02e69cdc78662141a3d0.png)
A minecraft modpack to make the game more fascinating than ever, it includes new structures, textures and features.
-
- ✨ **Additions** - New possibilities within the game
   - A world generation system that makes the terrain more realistic and stunning, also adds new biomes
   - Added a body temperature system, with related clothes and items
   - Ability to create your own ship or airship with game blocks
   - New ambient sounds and immersive footsteps
   - A dynamic lighting system
   - A seasons system
   - New ranged weapons, which can also be used by skeletons and illagers
   - A lot more...
-  🏛 **Structures** - new small and large structures, more complex and stunning villages and vanilla structures
   - New Small and large structures where you can find loot, including floating islands and new villager houses and pillager outposts.
   - Villages are now of many more types, larger, more complex and more beautiful.
   - Most of the vanilla structures like the jungle temple, desert pyramid, mansion, nether and  end fortresses are now modernized
- 🧱 **Texture/animations** - immersive animation and textures that modify most of the assets present in the game
   - New animations for most mobs and the character
   - A major texture pack that modifies all objects in the game, this also includes the graphics of objects from the inventory and the recreation of some objects in 3D
   - Fully redesigned game interface, simpler and more beautiful to look at
   - New visual aspects
   - Other small texture packs that tweak the game for the better...
-  🔧 **Functions** - new features, interface and performance improvements
   - Ability to host an online world and invite your friends, even playing with mods
   - Possibility to change the skin from the game
   - Other improvements...

❔When using an assembled ship or airship some blocks appear invisible | 
  Go to **Options**-**Video Settings**-**Performance** and disable **"Use Block Face Culling"**

❔How do I disable automatic book addition to my inventory when I create a new world? | Go to **Mods** and search for **"Mythic Charms"** then click on the **Configure** icon, now you can configure the mod and disable **"Give Charmicon on the first world load"**

❔The animation when I go up the ladders is broken | Go to **Mods** and search for **"NotEnoughAnimations"** then click on the **Configure** icon, now you can configure the mod and disable **"Ladder Animation"**

❔If you want to change nametags settings go to **Essential** settings
